problem_id: AI-Based Tender Evaluation and Eligibility Analysis for Government Procurement
team_name: GeM AI: Sovereign Multi-Agent Procurement Engine with Multimodal OCR & Immutable Audit
summary: Design a technical platform that, given a tender document and a set of bidder submissions, can understand the tender, understand each bidder, evaluate eligibility, and produce explainable evaluation reports that a human officer can trust and sign off on.
optimization_claims: Zero Data Leakage — fully local inference
constraints_addressed: Audit logs are fully editable at DB level
